questions.question: What is the core substitution in Constitutional AI versus standard RLHF?
questions.question_zh: 相比标准 RLHF，Constitutional AI 的核心替换是什么？
options: It replaces the human preference labeler with an AI labeler that reads a list of principles
It replaces PPO with DPO
It uses synthetic prompts instead of real ones
It removes the reward model entirely
options_zh: 用一个读取原则清单的 AI 标注器取代人类偏好标注者
用 DPO 取代 PPO
用合成 prompt 替代真实 prompt
完全去掉 reward model

questions.question: What does the first (SFT) phase of Constitutional AI do?
questions.question_zh: Constitutional AI 的第一阶段（SFT 阶段）做的是什么？
options: Trains a reward model on AI-generated preferences only
Produces an initial response, critiques it under a sampled constitution principle, then revises and uses the revision as SFT target
Generates synthetic principles by clustering labeler comments
Performs PPO with a constitution-derived reward
options_zh: 仅基于 AI 生成的偏好训练一个 reward model
先生成初始回答，用一条采样得到的宪法原则对其进行批评，然后修改，并把修改后的版本作为 SFT 目标
通过对标注者评论聚类来生成合成原则
使用从宪法推导出的 reward 跑 PPO

questions.question: What does the second (RLAIF) phase do?
questions.question_zh: 第二阶段（RLAIF 阶段）做的是什么？
options: Skips PPO and applies a single supervised loss
Has humans re-label the SFT outputs
Distills the constitution into the tokenizer
Trains a reward model on AI-generated preferences from a feedback model and runs PPO against it
options_zh: 跳过 PPO，只用一个监督 loss
让人类重新标注 SFT 阶段的输出
把宪法蒸馏进 tokenizer 中
用反馈模型生成的 AI 偏好训练一个 reward model，并在其上跑 PPO

questions.question: What is the tier order in Anthropic's January 2026 four-tier Claude constitution?
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 2026 年 1 月发布的 Claude 四层宪法中，各层的优先级顺序是怎样的？
options: Platform rules > avoid catastrophe > helpful > broadly ethical
Broadly ethical > helpful > platform rules > avoid catastrophe
Avoid catastrophic outcomes > follow Anthropic guidelines > broadly ethical > helpful and candid
Helpful > broadly ethical > platform rules > avoid catastrophe
options_zh: 平台规则 > 避免灾难 > 有用 > 大体合乎伦理
大体合乎伦理 > 有用 > 平台规则 > 避免灾难
避免灾难性后果 > 遵守 Anthropic 准则 > 大体合乎伦理 > 有用且坦诚
有用 > 大体合乎伦理 > 平台规则 > 避免灾难

questions.question: Which failure mode is NOT necessarily fixed by switching from RLHF to RLAIF?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一种失败模式不一定会因为从 RLHF 切换到 RLAIF 而被解决？
options: Labeler psychological inconsistency
Reward hacking / Goodhart's Law
Labeler cost
Labeler scarcity
options_zh: 标注者的心理一致性问题
reward hacking / Goodhart 定律
标注者成本
标注者稀缺

questions.question: What is the headline shift between Constitutional Classifiers v1 and v2 (2026)?
questions.question_zh: Constitutional Classifiers v1 与 v2 (2026) 之间最关键的变化是什么？
options: v2 increased compute overhead from 1% to 23.7%
v2 removed the classifier and relied on constitution alone
v2 only runs on input, not output
v2 dropped compute overhead from 23.7% to about 1% with low successful attack rate
options_zh: v2 把计算开销从 1% 提升到 23.7%
v2 移除了分类器，只依赖宪法本身
v2 只对输入运行，不对输出运行
v2 把计算开销从 23.7% 降到约 1%，同时保持很低的成功攻击率
